'''''Planet of the Amazons: The Tale of the Pirate Ship'' Mourning Glory''' was a bestselling memoir of [[Grov Bricker]]'s capture and time among the [[Hapan]]s.

The book provided one of the few views into [[Hapes Consortium/Legends|Hapan society]] prior to its formation of diplomatic relations with the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] in [[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]]. Its mysterious topic made the book wildly popular, despite its mix of fact and fiction.
